title: Ivy Jordan Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Ivy Jordan Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Ivy Jordan
Undergraduate Student
BS in Computer Science ’26
Combined Major, Computer Science and Design
For Ivy Jordan, Khoury College’s combined majors awakened a passion to try every field adjacent to computer science. Originally pursuing cybersecurity and criminal justice, she switched into computer science and political science before settling on her current major of computer science and design. Now looking ahead to experiential learning opportunities, she’s bringing her appetite for exploration into the field.
Explore all Khoury Stories
